Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) —
Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions segment files. Each entry contains variable details to facilitate 
understanding and use of the variables. 

ACP_MEDICARE 

LABEL: ADHD and Other Conduct
